g.text: until parity closes. The skill PAUSES and
asks the user whenever a modeling or
ambiguous. It owns the cycle boundary:
snapshots after + writes the diff pumls.
Diff mode is keyed on the rail-selected
file. The user is NOT asked to pick a
cycle globally: the cycle row lists only
the cycles that actually changed THIS file
defaulting to the latest. One such cycle
-> shown as a caption (no control); none
text buckets, scoped to that one file.
The diagram SVG is pre-rasterized by the
has no PlantUML engine and only consumes
element selection in the MODEL CONTEXT
